tab.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No validations recorded yet} one {# QC validation} other {# QC validations}} for this project.
tab.empty_hint: Open a trial batch and kick off its validation to start running weight, hardness, disintegration and organoleptic tests.

create.title: Start a new validation
create.subtitle: Validations attach to a trial batch — the batch defines what was manufactured and the sample count we test against.
create.notes_placeholder: Optional context for this validation run.
create.no_batches_hint: Every validation runs against a specific trial batch. Head to the Trial Batches tab to manufacture one before starting QC.
create.generic_error: Couldn't start the validation. Please try again.

weight.title: Weight test
weight.samples_hint: One row per capsule/tablet weighed. Press Enter to add the next sample.

disintegration.title: Disintegration test
disintegration.samples_hint: One row per capsule/tablet tested — per USP <701>, typically 6 units.

samples.empty: No samples recorded yet — click "Add sample" to start.
